title: TechBlock - OpenTech II
description: A survival 1.12.2 modpack where you can find hundreds of quests, hundreds of changed craftings recipes, original items and much, much more.
body:
We are pleased to introduce you to the next part of our interesting journey - OpenTech II. In this modpack we try to bring together almost every aspect of modded Minecraft, from technological advancements like Mekanism/Ender-IO to magical ones like Bees(Forestry)/Thaumcraft. So download this modpack now and become a part of our community.

**Website:** techblock.pl
